hero.title: Dentistry without the dread
hero.subtitle: Modern equipment, honest prices, and a team that explains what's happening before anything happens. Especially patient with people who'd rather be anywhere else.

contactCard.title: Book an appointment
contactCard.subtitle: Call us or leave your number and we'll get back within the hour during working time.

services.title: Treatments
services.subtitle: From regular check-ups to full smile makeovers.

items.title: Check-ups & cleaning
items.description: Examination, ultrasonic cleaning, and polishing. The visit that makes all other visits smaller and cheaper.

items.title: Fillings & repairs
items.description: Tooth-coloured composite fillings, done under local anaesthesia you'll barely notice.

items.title: Root canal treatment
items.description: Machine endodontics with digital X-ray control — precise, and far more comfortable than its reputation.

items.title: Crowns & bridges
items.description: Metal-free ceramic restorations, colour-matched to your teeth, made in a local lab we trust.

items.title: Teeth whitening
items.description: In-office whitening in one visit, with a realistic conversation first about what it can and can't do.

items.title: Children's dentistry
items.description: First visits that are actually fun, so the next twenty years of check-ups go easily.

about.title: The practice
about.subtitle: Two dentists, one hygienist, zero lectures about flossing.
about.body: Dr Milan Petrović opened the practice in 2010 after a decade in a large clinic, wanting appointments that don't feel like an assembly line. His daughter Dr Jelena joined in 2021. We keep the schedule loose enough that your 30-minute appointment actually lasts 30 minutes, and we never start a treatment before you understand what it is, why it's needed, and what it costs.
about.imageAlt: Dr Petrović with a patient at the practice

items.title: Nothing unexplained
items.description: You see the X-ray, hear the options, and decide. No surprise procedures.

items.title: Prices before treatment
items.description: Every plan comes with a written cost, agreed before we start.

items.title: Gentle anaesthesia
items.description: Warmed anaesthetic and slow application — most patients don't feel the needle.

items.title: On time
items.description: Average waiting-room time under five minutes. Your time matters too.

items.title: Digital X-ray
items.description: On-site imaging with a fraction of the radiation of older machines.

items.title: Nervous patients welcome
items.description: Tell us. We'll go slower, explain more, and pause whenever you raise a hand.

items.name: Ivana R.
items.text: I avoided dentists for ten years after a bad experience. Dr Petrović fixed everything over four visits and I never once felt rushed or judged.

items.name: Nemanja S.
items.text: My six-year-old asks when she can go to the dentist again. I don't know what kind of magic that is, but we're keeping it.

items.name: Marija L.
items.text: Root canal with zero pain, exactly at the quoted price. The written treatment plan made it easy to trust them.

pricing.title: Price list
pricing.subtitle: Full price list at the practice. A written treatment plan always comes before any work.

plans.name: Check-up & consultation
plans.description: Examination, advice, and a treatment plan if needed.

plans.name: Teeth whitening
plans.description: In-office whitening with take-home care kit.

items.question: I haven't been to a dentist in years. Where do I start?
items.answer: With a check-up — nothing else happens at that visit. You get an honest picture of where things stand and a plan broken into steps, ordered by urgency, with prices. Many 'disaster' mouths need far less work than their owners fear.

items.question: Does it hurt?
items.answer: Modern anaesthesia means treatments themselves shouldn't hurt at all. We warm the anaesthetic and apply it slowly, so even the needle is barely noticeable. And you always have a stop signal — raise your hand and we pause.

items.question: How do payments work?
items.answer: Cash or card after each visit. Larger treatment plans can be split across visits — you pay for what's done, when it's done. The written plan you approve up front is the price you pay.

items.question: Do you see children?
items.answer: Gladly, from the first tooth. First visits are short and playful — a ride in the chair, counting teeth, no drilling. The goal is a child who isn't afraid, which makes every later visit easier.

cta.title: Time for a check-up?
cta.subtitle: Book a visit — the first conversation costs nothing but half an hour.
